title: HK Repository — 事件檔案庫
rationale: No canonical URL — total link-rot risk. Unknown platform, no preservation pathway. Anonymous custodian, no institutional backing.

title: 11.26 大埔宏福苑火災紀錄庫
rationale: MkDocs static site (Markdown underneath — stable). Main risks: domain expiry and political takedown. Uses AI tools — workflow reproducibility risk.

title: wang-fuk-court-fire-investigation
rationale: GitHub is forkable (low R1/R2). FDS files are specialist format (mild R4). Highest political-risk investigation in registry. Pseudonymous creator with public email = elevated personal risk.

title: 大埔火災 全港350+資源整合網
rationale: Notion requires active subscription; export possible but not automatic.

title: 永遠紀念宏福苑
rationale: Already inactive — custodial abandonment has occurred. Domain renewal is single point of failure.

title: 宏福苑報平安【齋睇】
rationale: Inactive safety check-in. Vercel free-tier volatile. Missing-persons data = high ethical risk.

title: 大埔物資地圖
rationale: ArcGIS Online requires paid subscription. Curator stopped. Proprietary format.

title: HK Emergency Coordination Hub
rationale: GitHub-hosted, preservable. Custodially inactive. May attract political attention.

title: Care Wang Fuk
rationale: Custom domain requires renewal. Some content re-derivable from government open data.

title: 大埔宏福苑火災法律支援
rationale: Institutional backing (公益法香港) lowers custodial risk. Legal content politically sensitive but professionally defended.

title: 大埔守望
rationale: Donation tracking = politically exposed accountability content. ProtonMail contact indicates curator risk awareness.

title: 心理教育工作坊資源
rationale: Google Calendar embed depends on account persistence. Inactive + unknown owner.

title: 中醫支援資訊
rationale: Google Sheets durable while account lives. Low political risk.

title: 緊急資源簿
rationale: v0.dev / Vercel free-tier highly volatile. AI-generated code lacks reproducibility.

title: 宏福苑報平安 (Google Sheet)
rationale: Highest ethical risk — crowdsourced missing-persons data with potentially identifiable entries. Inactive but accessible.

title: 尋親庇護中心即時名單
rationale: Vercel free-tier volatility + missing persons data = both technical and ethical crisis.

title: 協尋與救助平台
rationale: Vercel, inactive, mutual-aid. Compounds Vercel risks with custodial abandonment.

title: 宏福苑消息
rationale: Niche platform with unclear longevity. Inactive + unknown custodian.

title: 宏福苑 Threads Back Up
rationale: Victim first-hand accounts. Highest combined legal + ethical risk. Pseudonymous curator @hkbackupper is high-exposure target.

title: Threads hashtag ecosystem
rationale: Distributed hashtag aggregate. Depends on Meta/Threads continuity. Individual posts deletable by users or platform.

title: Instagram hashtag ecosystem
rationale: Same as WFC-020. Instagram moderation can remove hashtags silently.
